notes: K-Active (К-Актив) — modern Russian ceramic composite armor developed for T-90M/T-14. Enhanced multi-hit ceramic blocks in resin matrix. RHAe ~2.1-2.5 per mm vs KE. Improved over Kvarts/K-5 era composites. Likely uses SiC or Al2O3 tiles with optimized backing.

source.reference: Open-source Russian armor analysis, T-90M/T-14 publications
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from reported T-90M and T-14 Armata protection levels, inferring composite efficiency from known glacis thickness.
